study_title: Deformed wing virus strain specific immune response in Apis mellifera
design: total RNA was isolated from experimentally infected honey bees (whole body pupa) using a Qiagen RNEasy kit. RNA was submitted to GENEWIZ Germany (Leipzig, Germany) for library preparation sequencing on the Illumina NovaSeq platform, resulting in 150 nucleotide pair-end stranded mRNA reads. Total reads ranged from 28-71 million per sample
sample_description: pupa injected with deformed wing virus A
